history.qwen_observation: Recipe validation failed because parameterized recipes were passed as colon-separated strings instead of explicit mappings with 'name' and parameter keys.
history.qwen_rationale: The runner does not support the colon-separated shorthand for parameterized recipes. Switching to the explicit mapping format resolves the validation error and allows the lombok version bump to proceed correctly.
